description_long: This is a wooden filing cabinet composed of three main rectangular sections, with the leftmost section being taller than the other two. The cabinet features a smooth, natural wood grain finish and is divided into multiple horizontal drawers, each with a seamless, handle-less front. The drawers are flush with the cabinet's surface, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The overall structure is sturdy and blocky, with clean, straight edges and a uniform color throughout. The cabinet is likely designed for storing documents or office supplies and would fit well in a professional or urban environment.
description: A modern, handle-less wooden filing cabinet with three blocky sections and multiple flush drawers, finished in a natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing three sections with visible horizontal drawer divisions and a taller leftmost section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and stepped profile of the cabinet, with no visible drawer divisions.
description_view_2: Rear or top-down view showing the flat tops of all three sections and the height difference between them.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the stepped profile and smooth wood surface.
